name: Saw Palmetto Serenoa repens
summary: Saw Palmetto centers on the berry.
description: Saw Palmetto centers on the berry. Key reported compounds include fatty acids; phytosterols (beta-sitosterol).
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

sources.title: An overview of herbal alternatives in androgenetic alopecia
Interactions between herbal medicines and prescribed drugs: an updated systematic review
Use of saw palmetto (Serenoa repens) extract for benign prostatic hyperplasia
v9.2: Large JAMA RCT found saw palmetto no better than placebo at 320–960 mg/day; block monetized recommendation.

claimMap.claim: v9.2: Large JAMA RCT found saw palmetto no better than placebo at 320–960 mg/day; block monetized recommendation.
claimMap.notes: v9.2: Large JAMA RCT found saw palmetto no better than placebo at 320–960 mg/day; block monetized recommendation.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 320 mg/day extract was tested; up to 960 mg/day showed no benefit in a large RCT

dosage: Lipidosterolic extract (85-95% fatty acids/sterols): 320 mg/day; evidence specific to standardized extracts
typical_dosage: Lipidosterolic extract (85-95% fatty acids/sterols): 320 mg/day; evidence specific to standardized extracts
